resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def brokenCalc(self, startValue: int, target: int) -> int:
        res = 0
        while target > startValue:
            if target % 2 == 0:
                target //= 2
            else:
                target += 1
            res += 1
        return res + startValue - target
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log(target))
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution uses a greedy approach, always trying to get closer to the target value by either dividing by 2 or adding 1, depending on whether the target is even or odd.
